'''Rathalay''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] known for its vast private beaches. The planet exported [[Rathalayan firestone]]s.

[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Octavian Grant|Grant]], as part of his agreement to defect to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], was allowed to retire to a villa on this world, although [[Jan Ors]] kept an eye on him.

The planet was also the base of [[Kaerobani]] and the [[Lumini pirates/Legends|Lumini Pirates]]: in Kaerobani's [[Kaerobani's base|den]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] retrieved a stolen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kaerobani's holocron|Holocron]] and escaped.<ref name="MotS" /> Many tourists visited the wealthy world. The [[Solo family/Legends|Solo family]] took a brief vacation there during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] to try and escape [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] political responsibilities.

{{Planet-stub}}
